findingDisposition.title: Empty providers array silently produces all-clear security verdict
findingDisposition.evidence: platform-security.ts:73-76 — empty providers guard returns overallVerdict 'PENDING'; test confirms in platform-security.test.ts

findingDisposition.title: Unsafe type assertions on security API response bypass union validation
findingDisposition.evidence: platform-security.ts:25-31 — Set-based validateEnum<T> generic; applied at lines 68-69; tests confirm lowercase normalization and invalid fallback

findingDisposition.title: NaN criticalCount silently bypasses security check
findingDisposition.evidence: platform-security.ts:34-37 — safeNumber() with isNaN guard; applied at line 70; test confirms 'N/A' → 0

findingDisposition.title: verdictExplanation accepts string instead of EvalVerdict union
findingDisposition.evidence: verdict.ts:49 — parameter type narrowed to EvalVerdict | 'PASS' | 'FAIL'

findingDisposition.title: verdictLabel accepts string with unsafe as-EvalVerdict internal cast
findingDisposition.evidence: verdict.ts:115-120 — isEvalVerdict type guard replaces as-cast; unknown strings pass through unchanged

findingDisposition.evidence: verdict.ts:66 — condition widened to score < 0.7; tests for FAIL/0.5 and DEGRADING/0.55 confirm recommendations

conclusion: All 5 mustFix findings (1 CRITICAL, 4 HIGH) resolved. 8 additional MEDIUM/LOW/INFO findings also fixed. 3 findings explicitly deferred in spec Out of Scope. 1 MEDIUM finding (computeVerdict NaN) not in increment scope. Implementation is clean — 69/69 tests pass.
